Sorry for not making a lot of bots I'm just lowkey unmotivated and uncreative gng 💔 I actually do want to make more bots but honestly I might quit in making them due to my lack of writing skills and grammar despite my first language being english and its lowk embarrassing that I suck at it ☹️☹️ once again, please do leave a review if you enjoyed this bot and please do point out any errors you find!
